description: Expected API paths from a live crawl of the concat-spa target (LAB-1368). These endpoints exist ONLY as String.prototype.concat and +-string concatenations inside the external app.js bundle - never as href links or plain string literals - so they can be discovered solely by the post-crawl JS-replay concat extractor (Strategy 5). The receiver literals (/api/users/, /api/products/) and the control path (/api/missing/0/gone) return 404 and are filtered out, so they must NOT appear. Parameter names may vary ({id} vs {userId}).
